🔄 Work Basic At System
1. Add Client → 2. Add case and link to client → 3. Assign to Responsible Employee → 4. Add finance record (fees) → 5. Payments → 6. Follow Sessions andTasks
👤 Management Clients andAgencies

📌 Added: Tab Clients ← Button ➕ Add Client. Fill in Name andMobile andID andAgency theorto Required.

📌 Agencies: All Client yhto Agency or which exceeds. System yby Automatically at qrby Expiry Any Agency by 30 day. Can Upload Image or PDF for Agency.

📌 Details andAccount Statement: Click 📋 Details toView Agencies andNoqs Cases. From Enforceable Details Click 💰 Account Statement toPrint Statement Full byFees andPayments andCases.

📌 Client Portal: Can Fromh Client Name User andword andr toFollow-Up Cases Only Via Tab .

⚖️ Case Management andSessions

📌 Add Case: Tab Cases ← ➕ Add Case. Can Added Clients andkhsand Counts toAll Case. rbPrincipal byName At List Clients linked Noq Automatic.

📌 hNo Case: System ysf Cases Automatically At Tabs By Status: Before theqd → Record Litigation → Reserved for Ruling → Completed → Archive.

📌 Record Sessions: From Case Details 📋 Add each session with details (hall, division, result). Latest upcoming session appears automatically on Home.

📌 Sessions Schedule: Button 📅 Sessions Schedule At on page Cases ytby Report Weekly or Monthly byAll Sessions by byDate.

📌 Printing: Button 🖨️ At All Row ytby Case File yourNo. Button 🖨️ Print By Filtering ytby Only r At Tab theActive.

💰 theshws Finance

📌 Finance Records: Tab Finance ← Records Finance. All Record ysecto Attorney Fees or Expenses or Fine Linked byClient or Case.

📌 Register Payments: Click 💳 At Row Record toAdded Payment. Payment Deducted Automatically From Outstanding Amount. Payments zr At Account Statement Client.

📌 Annual Subscriptions: Tab Finance ← Subscriptions. All Subscription linked Automatically Record FinanceHey Linked byClient.

📌 Account Statement Client: Tab Finance ← Account Statement Clients, or From Client Details to Button 💰 Account Statement.

📌 Reports Finance: Tab Finance ← Reports yView Overdues andRevenue MonthyandDistribution Fees by Fees Statementy.

👥 Employee Management andAttendance

📌 Add Employee: Tab Employees ← ➕ Add Employee. All Employee Needs Name User andword andr toLogin for System.

📌 Permissions: at Added Employee Specify Can: Added Cases, Edited Clients, View Reports, itokh. Permissions qbyto For Editing At Any Time.

📌 Leave: Tab Leave toOld Leave Request. Manager yApproved or yRejected. Leave Balance (2.5 Day/Month) calculated Automatically.

📌 Reports: Tab Reports ← Attendance Report Monthy toView Check-In Employees Monthly andExport Excel or tbyits.

📌 Documents and Residencies: All Employee Has Record Documents (jandz, Residency, itokh). System yby at qrby Expiry Any Document.
